summary: Testing iteration 9: New mortgage case fields (Interest Rate Type, Initial Product Term) and database wipe endpoint. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: UI verified - new fields are present and functional in both Cases form and CaseDetail edit mode.

backend_api: POST /api/cases with interest_rate_type='fixed' - returns correct field
POST /api/cases with interest_rate_type='variable' - returns correct field
POST /api/cases with interest_rate_type='tracker' - returns correct field
POST /api/cases with interest_rate_type='discounted' - returns correct field
POST /api/cases with interest_rate_type='capped' - returns correct field
GET /api/cases/{id} - returns interest_rate_type and initial_product_term correctly
PUT /api/cases/{id} - can update interest_rate_type and initial_product_term
DELETE /api/admin/wipe-data - wipes all clients, cases, tasks successfully
frontend_new_case_form: Cases page shows empty state after wipe (Mortgage 0, Insurance 0)
New Case form: Interest Rate Type dropdown present with data-testid='case-interest-rate-type'
New Case form: Interest Rate Type dropdown has all 5 options: Fixed, Variable, Discounted, Tracker, Capped
New Case form: Initial Product Term (Years) input present with data-testid='case-initial-product-term'
Case creation with all fields successful
frontend_case_detail: CaseDetail page: Shows Interest Rate Type in display mode
CaseDetail page: Shows Initial Product Term in display mode (e.g., '5 years')
CaseDetail edit mode: Interest Rate Type dropdown present with data-testid='case-detail-interest-rate-type'
CaseDetail edit mode: Interest Rate Type dropdown has all 5 options
CaseDetail edit mode: Initial Product Term input present with data-testid='case-detail-initial-product-term'
CaseDetail: Can select Interest Rate Type and save successfully
CaseDetail: Can update Initial Product Term and save successfully

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Interest Rate Type dropdown correctly implemented with all 5 options (Fixed, Variable, Discounted, Tracker, Capped)
GOOD: Initial Product Term field correctly stored as integer
GOOD: CaseDetail.js line 146 has parseInt for initial_product_term in save handler
GOOD: CaseDetail displays interest_rate_type with proper formatting (underscore to space, capitalize)
GOOD: wipe-data endpoint properly clears clients, cases, and tasks collections
seed_data_creation: Created test client 'TEST_CaseFields TestClient' and test case with interest_rate_type='fixed', initial_product_term=5
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 testing complete. New mortgage case fields (interest_rate_type, initial_product_term) work correctly in both backend API and frontend UI. The Interest Rate Type dropdown has 5 options: Fixed, Variable, Discounted, Tracker, Capped. Initial Product Term is stored as integer. CaseDetail page displays these fields in both view and edit modes. DELETE /api/admin/wipe-data endpoint tested and working - clears all data.
